title: Transformable tools-transporting system and related transformation method
abstract: A system (1) is described, for transporting a plurality of tools designed for be transformable into at least one temporary workplace (2) adapted to enable performing a plurality of working jobs in the field of optical fibers through said workplace (2); the system (1) is equipped with: an external case, composed of a lower portion (3), and of an upper portion (5); at least one bearing element (4); two or more multi-function bars (6); and four or more supporting elements (8) arranged inside the upper portion (5) of the case during the transport of the system (1) by a user. A method for transforming such system is also described.
